Calculation.Text: // fron Chat gpt Let ( [ // Remove "Z" at the end (optional, since it is not needed) dateTime = Substitute ( isoDateString ; "Z" ; "" ); // Replace "T" with a space to separate the date and time formattedDateTime = Substitute ( dateTime ; "T" ; " " ); // Extract the date and the first 5 characters of the time part (HH:MM) readableDateTime = Left ( formattedDateTime ; Position ( formattedDateTime ; ":" ; 1 ; 2 ) - 1 ) ]; readableDateTime )
